provenance.notes: Migrated for 0.20.0 schema: advisor pass produced via the mandatory advisor agent path before provenance was a required field.

diffCoverage.notes: Harness-only change: skillExamples.skillsDir repoint to .kiro/skills, the harness:check npm script, and its engine-aware wrapper. No src-tauri/src source touched.

findings.evidence: harness-check.mjs reads structuralTest.engine and returns a no-op pass (exit 0) while engine=none, matching ADR-0003; it only delegates to a runner once an engine + adapter exist.
findings.fix: No change required; revisit when the Rust structural adapter is wired and engine flips off none.

summary: Harness control-plane fix only: skillExamples.skillsDir now points at the Kiro runtime (.kiro/skills), and harness:check is wired as an engine-aware structural no-op (ADR-0003). No source, auth, secret, trust-boundary, or layer change. Attested structural + skill-examples checks pass against the new layout. Safe to mark done.
